BANWELL DESIGNS

Leather Masquerade Masks • Designed & Made in California

Fashion Mask Collection

Dear Wholesale Partner,

Thank you for your interest in our leather mask collection. Our family has been designing and making these pieces for nearly 20 years. Each mask is made with premium vegetable-tanned leather, individually painted and features signature intricate cut work.

This catalog features 39 designs — 33 fashion masks and 6 masks specifically designed to work with eyeglasses. All masks are made to order in our California workshop and ship within 10 business days.

We offer wholesale pricing starting at 40% off retail for initial orders of $400 or more. Most masks retail between $34-$115, with wholesale prices ranging from $20-$69 depending on complexity.

Please let me know if you'd like to discuss this further or if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Erin Banwell
Banwell Designs
erin@banwelldesigns.com
banwelldesigns.com

Wholesale Pricing Tiers

Tier 1: $400+ minimum order = 40% off retail

Tier 2: $800+ minimum order = 50% off retail

Tier 3: $1,200+ minimum order = 55% off retail

Example: A mask that retails for $50 costs you $30 at Tier 1 (40% off), $25 at Tier 2 (50% off), or $22.50 at Tier 3 (55% off).

Reorders: No minimum order size once you're established as a wholesale customer.

Shipping: Free shipping on orders over $500. Under $500, flat rate $15 USPS Priority Mail.

Terms: Net 30 for established accounts. First orders require payment before shipping.

Lead Time: Made to order, ships within 10 business days.

Press & Celebrity Features

Our leather masks have been featured in major publications, worn by celebrities, and seen on television including Disney, Vogue Paris, Rolling Stone, CW's Smallville, and So You Think You Can Dance.

Disney's "Descendants: The Rise of Red"
Kylie Cantrall wearing Hearts Mask (2024)

Vogue Paris "Bal Masqué"
Rabbit Mask editorial (Oct 2010)

Jared Leto & Skrillex
Bunny Mask in short film

CW's Smallville
Lois Lane wearing Swirly Mask

Paris Hilton
Raven Mask at Burning Man

Our leather masks have also been exhibited at Oxford University's Museum of the History of Science.
